identity.name: Cloud App — Okta Risky OAuth Drive-Scope Grant
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-CLOUD-001. Plane: CLOUD_APP. Primary technique: T1550.001. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-CLOUD-001. Plane: CLOUD_APP. Primary technique: T1550.001. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-CLOUD-001.
UC: Risky OAuth Scope Grant Detection / TC: Okta — User Grants Drive-Wide Scope to Untrusted App.

techniques.name: Use Alternate Authentication Material: Application Access Token

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-CLOUD-001 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Pre-flight: confirm oauth_grant_emulator plugin is registered
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli describe oauth_grant_emulator \
  | jq -e '.eal_targets | length > 0'
# step-2: Single risky-drive grant request to Okta authorize endpoint
cat > /tmp/cloud-001.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-CLOUDAPP-001
name: "Cloud App — Okta risky drive grant"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - cortexsim-canary.okta.com
dry_run: false
tags: [cloud-app, okta, oauth, risky-scope]
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: oauth_grant_emulator
    params:
      provider: okta
      scope_preset: risky_drive
      iterations: 1
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/cloud-001.yml --live
# step-3: Repeated grant attempts (x3) to confirm rate-pattern detection
cat > /tmp/cloud-001-burst.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-CLOUDAPP-001
name: "Cloud App — Okta risky grant burst"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - cortexsim-canary.okta.com
dry_run: false
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: oauth_grant_emulator
    params:
      provider: okta
      scope_preset: risky_drive
      iterations: 3
      sleep_seconds: 5
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/cloud-001-burst.yml --live
